nodes.name: 黑啄木鳥
nodes.summary: 黑啄木鳥（Black woodpecker，学名 Dryocopus martius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括成熟森林。

nodes.name: 成熟森林
nodes.summary: 具备成熟林冠和树洞资源的森林生境。

nodes.name: 中华人民共和国
nodes.summary: 中华人民共和国是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联285种鸟类，包括青头潜鸭、花脸鸭、黄腹角雉等285种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 伊朗

nodes.name: 朝鮮 (地區)
nodes.summary: 朝鮮 (地區)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联39种鸟类，包括丹顶鹤、朱鹮、黑琴鸡等39种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: British Birds (magazine)
nodes.summary: British Birds is a monthly ornithology magazine that was established in 1907.

nodes.name: 熱帶森林

nodes.name: 中东
nodes.summary: 中东是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括Sand partridge、大红鹳、Yellow-legged gull等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: HarperCollins Publishers, London. The black woodpecker is mainly found in forested regions, with a preference for extensive, mature woodland, including coniferous, tropical, subtropical and boreal forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Approximately 80 sightings of the species in the UK have been reported, but some of these are disputed, though the proximity of the British Isles to the species' range in Western Europe means that the species may cross over on a regular basis

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: | image = Желна (Dryocopus martius, fem), «Городская шумашешая».jpg | image_caption = Adult female | genus = Dryocopus | species = martius | authority = (Linnaeus, 1758) | range_map= Dryocopus martius distr.PNG | range_map_caption=Black woodpecker range | synonyms = Picus martius }} thumb|Black woodpecker drumming right|thumb|Black woodpecker calls The black woodpecker (Dryocopus martius) is a large woodpecker that lives in mature forests across the northern Palearctic
